mapper.select:
SELECT /*kr.or.ddit.domain.member.resident.mapper.IVhclMapper.selectMyVhclList*/ RSID_VHCL_NO , VHCL_NM , VHCL_NO , USER_NO , HO_NO , VHCL_STTS_CD , REG_DT , VHCL_FILE_NO FROM RSID_VHCL
WHERE HO_NO IN
#{ho}
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(HO_NO, '[^_]+', 1, 2)), TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(HO_NO, '[^_]+', 1, 3)), REG_DT DESC

SELECT CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO ,CR.CHAT_ROOM_NM ,CM.MSG_CN AS LAST_MSG ,CM.REG_DTTM AS LAST_TIME ,NVL(MC.MEMBER_CNT, 0) AS MEMBER_CNT
,NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_MESSAGE M WHERE M.CHAT_ROOM_NO = CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO AND M.CHAT_MSG_NO > NVL(( SELECT MR.LAST_READ_MSG_NO FROM CHAT_ROOM_READ MR WHERE MR.CHAT_ROOM_NO = CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO AND MR.CHAT_MEMBER_ID = CRM.CHAT_MEMBER_ID ), 0) ), 0) AS UNREAD_CNT
FROM CHAT_ROOM CR INNER JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER CRM ON CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO = CRM.CHAT_ROOM_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CHAT_ROOM_NO, COUNT(*) AS MEMBER_CNT FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER WHERE LEFT_DTTM IS NULL GROUP BY CHAT_ROOM_NO ) MC ON CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO = MC.CHAT_ROOM_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CHAT_ROOM_NO, MSG_CN, REG_DTTM FROM ( SELECT CHAT_ROOM_NO, MSG_CN, REG_DTTM, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CHAT_ROOM_NO ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC ) AS RN FROM CHAT_MESSAGE ) WHERE RN = 1 ) CM ON CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO = CM.CHAT_ROOM_NO
WHERE CRM.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CR.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND CRM.LEFT_DTTM IS NULL AND CR.USE_YN = 'Y'
ORDER BY CM.REG_DTTM DESC
SELECT HO_NO FROM HSHLD_HEAD WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND HO_NO LIKE #{aptCmplexNo} || '%' AND INOUT_CD NOT IN ('OUT', 'MID')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RSID_VHCL WHERE HO_NO IN
#{ho}
SELECT user_no ,ho_no FROM rsid_vhcl WHERE vhcl_no = #{vhclNo}
SELECT VHCL_FILE_NO ,USER_NO FROM rsid_vhcl WHERE rsid_vhcl_no = #{rsidVhclNo}
